div.h2: CLR vs UPDATE Record Binary Specification

tr.td: Used to restore state during rollbacks.
During recovery, CLR payload is REDO.

ul.li: All LSNs must be 8-byte aligned for atomic loads.

g.text: UPDATE [ 24B Header | 12B Addr | N Payload | M Payload | 4B CRC ]
CLR [ 24B Header | 12B Addr | N Payload | 8B Link | 4B CRC ]
